repository.legacy_repository_policy: Do not include or reintroduce legacy repository references.

stageOne.description: Initial OCR intake from already-scanned PDF files using scanner-native OCR text and connector extraction where available.
outputs: Notion review/database export when connector execution is approved

stageTwo.description: Adobe Acrobat OCR only for documents flagged by Stage One.

stageThree.description: ChatGPT/OpenAI review for limited matching line items after Stage One and Stage Two outputs exist.

openaiApiKey.safeSetup: Use the OpenAI Developers secure key-creation flow when exposed. Do not store plaintext keys in source, Notion, or chat.

notion.policy: Use Notion for review status and handoff notes. Do not store API keys, refresh tokens, passwords, client secrets, or recovery codes.
